description_long: This castle features a central tall cylindrical tower with a conical roof topped by a red flag, surrounded by several shorter round towers with crenellated battlements. The main entrance is a large arched doorway flanked by smaller windows and arrow slits, giving the structure a fortified appearance. The walls are uniformly light-colored, resembling stone or plaster, and the towers are connected by rectangular walls with additional battlements. The rear of the castle is dominated by a large rectangular keep, providing a sense of mass and solidity. The overall design is simple yet evocative of medieval European castles, with minimal decorative elements and a focus on defensive architecture. The structure appears solid and imposing, suitable as a landmark or tourist attraction in an urban park or plaza.
description: A light-colored medieval-style castle with a tall central tower, crenellated battlements, and a red flag, surrounded by round towers and a large rectangular keep.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, central tower with conical roof and flag, and two round towers with battlements.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the cylindrical towers, connecting walls, and the conical roof of the central tower.
description_view_2: Rear angled view showing the large rectangular keep and the back of the central tower, with battlements visible.
description_view_3: Back view dominated by the rectangular keep and a round tower, with battlements lining the top edges.
